name: AWS EC2-Instance-Connect WebSocket Tunnel Establishment Attempt
description: The attempt to establish a WebSocket tunnel via EC2-Instance-Connect can indicate unauthorized efforts to bypass network security mechanisms. This activity could allow attackers to create covert communication channels, facilitating data exfiltration or maintaining persistent access to a compromised EC2 instance. It's critical to monitor these attempts to prevent unauthorized access and mitigate lateral movement within the environment.

rules.name: AWS EC2-Instance-Connect WebSocket Tunnel Establishment Attempt

author: Sunil Bharti & David Agni
